systems.name: AssetOrchard swap

public_instances.name: pool_domain
public_instances.binding: host recomputes from chain_id, genesis_hash, protocol_version, pool_id and note_version

public_instances.name: anchor
public_instances.binding: both input Merkle paths terminate at this root

public_instances.name: input_0_nullifier
public_instances.binding: derived in circuit from input note opening and nullifier key

public_instances.name: input_1_nullifier
public_instances.binding: derived in circuit from input note opening and nullifier key

public_instances.name: input_0_rk_x
public_instances.binding: randomized spend verification key constrained from ak and alpha

public_instances.name: input_0_rk_y
public_instances.binding: randomized spend verification key constrained from ak and alpha

public_instances.name: input_1_rk_x
public_instances.binding: randomized spend verification key constrained from ak and alpha

public_instances.name: input_1_rk_y
public_instances.binding: randomized spend verification key constrained from ak and alpha

public_instances.name: output_0_commitment
public_instances.binding: recomputed from complete output note opening

public_instances.name: output_1_commitment
public_instances.binding: recomputed from complete output note opening

public_instances.name: encrypted_output_0_hash_limb_0
public_instances.binding: H_action commitment

public_instances.name: encrypted_output_0_hash_limb_1
public_instances.binding: H_action commitment

public_instances.name: encrypted_output_0_hash_limb_2
public_instances.binding: H_action commitment

public_instances.name: encrypted_output_1_hash_limb_0
public_instances.binding: H_action commitment

public_instances.name: encrypted_output_1_hash_limb_1
public_instances.binding: H_action commitment

public_instances.name: encrypted_output_1_hash_limb_2
public_instances.binding: H_action commitment

public_instances.name: fee
public_instances.binding: v1 requires zero and circuit binds it

public_instances.name: base_asset_tag_lo
public_instances.binding: pricing and private-leg permutation constraints

public_instances.name: base_asset_tag_hi
public_instances.binding: pricing and private-leg permutation constraints

public_instances.name: quote_asset_tag_lo
public_instances.binding: pricing and private-leg permutation constraints

public_instances.name: quote_asset_tag_hi
public_instances.binding: pricing and private-leg permutation constraints

public_instances.name: ratio_numerator
public_instances.binding: exact integer pricing equation with bounded rounding witness

public_instances.name: ratio_denominator
public_instances.binding: exact integer pricing equation with bounded rounding witness

public_instances.name: pricing_commitment_limb_0
public_instances.binding: SHA3-384 commitment to epoch, reserve packet, ratio, mode, band and asset tags

public_instances.name: pricing_commitment_limb_1
public_instances.binding: SHA3-384 commitment to epoch, reserve packet, ratio, mode, band and asset tags

public_instances.name: pricing_commitment_limb_2
public_instances.binding: SHA3-384 commitment to epoch, reserve packet, ratio, mode, band and asset tags

public_instances.name: h_action_limb_0
public_instances.binding: in-circuit Poseidon over domain constants and public indices 0 through 25

public_instances.name: h_action_limb_1
public_instances.binding: in-circuit Poseidon over domain constants and public indices 0 through 25

private_witnesses: four complete note openings: diversifier, g_d, pk_d, asset tag, value, rho, psi and rcm
two input Merkle positions and 32-level authentication paths
two input spend authorities: ak, alpha and rivk
host_only_checks: live circuit ID and VK selection
pricing commitment interpretation and certified reserve-policy freshness
RedPallas spend signatures over the action sighash
systems.compatibility_note: H_action retains the v3 proof-binding constant while live proof verification requires the v4 VK; replay v3 is reachable only through the archive policy. Circuit selection, not H_action alone, prevents cross-version acceptance.

systems.name: AssetOrchard private egress

public_instances.name: pool_domain
public_instances.binding: host recomputes chain/genesis/protocol/pool domain

public_instances.name: anchor
public_instances.binding: input Merkle path terminates at this root

public_instances.name: nullifier
public_instances.binding: derived in circuit from the input note

public_instances.name: rk_x
public_instances.binding: randomized spend verification key

public_instances.name: rk_y
public_instances.binding: randomized spend verification key

public_instances.name: asset_tag_lo
public_instances.binding: must equal the spent note asset tag

public_instances.name: asset_tag_hi
public_instances.binding: must equal the spent note asset tag

public_instances.name: amount
public_instances.binding: nonzero and must equal the spent note value

public_instances.name: fee
public_instances.binding: v1 action requires zero

public_instances.name: exit_binding_hash_limb_0
public_instances.binding: recipient, public asset ID, amount, fee, policy, disclosure, chain/genesis/protocol and pool

public_instances.name: exit_binding_hash_limb_1
public_instances.binding: recipient, public asset ID, amount, fee, policy, disclosure, chain/genesis/protocol and pool

public_instances.name: h_action_limb_0
public_instances.binding: in-circuit Poseidon over domain constants and public indices 0 through 10

public_instances.name: h_action_limb_1
public_instances.binding: in-circuit Poseidon over domain constants and public indices 0 through 10

private_witnesses: spend authority ak, alpha and rivk
host_only_checks: live circuit ID and VK selection
exact exit-binding recomputation from public credit fields
nullifier uniqueness and public-credit state transition
systems.compatibility_note: H_action retains the v1 proof-binding constant while live proof verification requires the v2 VK; v1 is archive-replay-only.

systems.name: NAV SP1 Groth16 aggregate
systems.status: profile-gated consensus verifier; real-value provenance incomplete
systems.proof_binding: Groth16Verifier verifies the entire public-values byte string against the profile-bound 32-byte SP1 program vkey and the pinned sp1-verifier Groth16 VK
systems.packet_binding: decoded spot_total + cash_total - liability must equal reserve_packet.verified_net_assets
systems.residual_gate: The aggregate guest source, build recipe and program-vkey reproduction are not present in this repository. The host decodes only the fields above and accepts a minimum ABI length; production activation requires exact guest provenance, a canonical ABI/vector package and governed program/VK activation evidence.

systems.name: Debug shielded proof adapter
systems.status: test/benchmark and legacy replay support only
systems.reachability: used by bench_harness and the legacy privacy crate; live legacy Mint/Spend creation and admission are disabled, so it is not a supported production privacy proof
systems.residual_gate: remove from a production binary profile or keep compile-time unreachable from every live mutation endpoint

verdict.source_publication: AssetOrchard live public-instance and witness bindings are fully inventoried; SP1 and debug-system limitations are explicitly contained and cannot be marketed as independently reproducible production proof systems.
verdict.real_value: blocked pending independent circuit review, SP1 guest/program reproduction, production activation/rollback ceremony and exact candidate-run evidence
